explain: Embed raw EEG into temporal tokens using temporal, spatial, and pooling convolutions.
Project patch channels into the shared embedding dimension.
Add learnable positional encoding to preserve token order.
Coarse temporal branch with larger ConvTime kernels.
Fine temporal branch with smaller ConvTime kernels.
Intra-branch self-attention for the coarse branch.
Intra-branch self-attention for the fine branch.
Learn token weights before pooling each branch.
Convert class logits into prediction probabilities.
